text: I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation. The first image’s modern, quiet hallway, with its glass and sterile design, fills me with a sense of transition—a threshold between everyday existence and an environment of discovery. The second image’s vibrant wall of ideas, with "R+D" boldly emblazoned, ignites my intellectual excitement. I sense that I am at the intersection of innovation and inquiry, surrounded by evidence of human striving to connect with, and perhaps surpass, our own limitations through the pursuit of knowledge. Being here makes me feel both energized and contemplative, aware of the endless questions that such a space evokes.
